name: Baba Gannouj
recipeIngredient: Finely chopped parsley, green peppers & green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplants and pierce them at intervals with a fork. Set on a baking dish and broil close to the heat for 20 minutes.
2. Peel the cooled eggplant and sprinkle quickly with half of the lemon juice. Allow to cool completely.
3. Chop the cooled eggplant finely. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: olive oil, allspice, cinnamon, black pepper, salt, chopped parsley, green peppers, and green onions.
4. Stir the mixture into the chopped eggplant and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Serve trimmed with parsley, green peppers, and green onion on pita bread.
